About Me

Fraud risk roots.
Analytics future.

I'm a Data Analyst with 4.8+ years of experience rooted in Fraud Risk Analysis and Financial Operations. My background has sharpened my ability to find signal in noise — skills I now apply across the full analytics spectrum.

I leverage SQL, Python, Power BI, and machine learning to go from raw, messy data to clear, actionable decisions. From fraud detection and credit risk to marketing analytics and demand forecasting, I enjoy solving complex business problems through data.

I believe the best analysis is invisible — it simply makes the right decision obvious.

Featured Projects

Work that speaks for itself.

01 / 06↗
Healthcare Fraud Risk Analytics & Investigation Framework

End-to-end fraud detection — suspicious claims identification, risk quantification, pattern detection, risk segmentation, and interactive Power BI reporting.

SQLPostgreSQLPythonPower BIFraud Analytics
02 / 06↗
Marketing Campaign Optimization – A/B Testing & Conversion Analytics

Analyzed 365-day Facebook & Instagram data. Welch's t-test proved Facebook ~2× higher conversions. Forecasting model achieved ~89% R² accuracy.

PythonA/B TestingRegressionForecasting
03 / 06↗
Netflix Subscription Analytics – Churn Prediction & Segmentation

Analyzed 50K+ user records. Logistic Regression churn model + K-Means LTV segmentation. Cohort analysis guided personalization and retention strategy.

PythonSQLPower BILogistic RegressionK-Means
04 / 06↗
Credit Risk Analytics & Portfolio Intelligence Framework

Credit risk framework on 20K+ profiles. ~85% classification accuracy (ROC-AUC) with probability-based risk banding across 4 tiers.

PythonLogistic RegressionRisk ModelingFinancial Analytics
05 / 06↗
Blinkit Quick-Commerce BI Dashboard & Demand Forecasting

Analytics on 13K+ products. Random Forest ~88% R². Power BI dashboards tracking $6.1M+ revenue, offer effectiveness, and inventory replenishment risk.

SQLPythonPower BIDAXRandom Forest
06 / 06↗
Gold Price Forecasting – Financial Time Series Analytics

10-year gold price forecasting using ARIMA and decomposition. Seasonality, volatility, and macro trend analysis for investment insights.

PythonARIMATime SeriesFinancial Analytics
